'''鈭歞h-k-t''' ('''dhakata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:modelize|modelize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:modelize|modelize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-k-t
|-
! Lemma
| dhakata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakatithi|dhakatithi]] || [[word:dhakatiji|dhakatiji]] || [[word:dhakatishi|dhakatishi]] || [[word:dhakati|dhakati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakatuthuth|dhakatuthuth]] || [[word:dhakatujuj|dhakatujuj]] || [[word:dhakatushush|dhakatushush]] || [[word:dhakat|dhakat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakatuthu|dhakatuthu]] || [[word:dhakatuju|dhakatuju]] || [[word:dhakatushu|dhakatushu]] || [[word:dhakatu|dhakatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakatufuth|dhakatufuth]] || [[word:dhakatufuj|dhakatufuj]] || [[word:dhakatufush|dhakatufush]] || [[word:dhakatuf|dhakatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakatethe|dhakatethe]] || [[word:dhakateje|dhakateje]] || [[word:dhakateshe|dhakateshe]] || [[word:dhakate|dhakate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakatothoth|dhakatothoth]] || [[word:dhakatojoj|dhakatojoj]] || [[word:dhakatoshosh|dhakatoshosh]] || [[word:dhakat|dhakat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakatotho|dhakatotho]] || [[word:dhakatojo|dhakatojo]] || [[word:dhakatosho|dhakatosho]] || [[word:dhakato|dhakato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakatofoth|dhakatofoth]] || [[word:dhakatofoj|dhakatofoj]] || [[word:dhakatofosh|dhakatofosh]] || [[word:dhakatof|dhakatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakat忙th忙|dhakat忙th忙]] || [[word:dhakat忙j忙|dhakat忙j忙]] || [[word:dhakat忙sh忙|dhakat忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhakat忙|dhakat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakatathath|dhakatathath]] || [[word:dhakatajaj|dhakatajaj]] || [[word:dhakatashash|dhakatashash]] || [[word:dhakat|dhakat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakatatha|dhakatatha]] || [[word:dhakataja|dhakataja]] || [[word:dhakatasha|dhakatasha]] || [[word:dhakata|dhakata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakatafath|dhakatafath]] || [[word:dhakatafaj|dhakatafaj]] || [[word:dhakatafash|dhakatafash]] || [[word:dhakataf|dhakataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhakatasha|dhakatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhakatasha|godhakatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhakatasha|gokidhakatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhakatn眉sha|dhakatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhakatnkn眉sha|godhakatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakatn眉sha|gokidhakatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhakatsh毛sha|dhakatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhakatnksh毛sha|godhakatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhakatsh毛sha|gokidhakatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakatrosha|dhakatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakatnkrosha|godhakatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakatrosha|gokidhakatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakatmusha|dhakatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakatnkmusha|godhakatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakatmusha|gokidhakatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhakatsherasha|dhakatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhakatnksherasha|godhakatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhakatsherasha|gokidhakatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhakatngasha|dhakatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhakatnkngasha|godhakatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhakatngasha|gokidhakatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhakatyasha|dhakatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhakatnkyasha|godhakatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhakatyasha|gokidhakatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhakatyamasha|dhakatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhakatnkyamasha|godhakatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhakatyamasha|gokidhakatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakatn眉sh毛sha|dhakatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakatnkn眉sh毛sha|godhakatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakatn眉sh毛sha|gokidhakatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakatn眉rosha|dhakatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakatnkn眉rosha|godhakatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakatn眉rosha|gokidhakatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakatn眉musha|dhakatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakatnkn眉musha|godhakatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakatn眉musha|gokidhakatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakatsh毛n眉sha|dhakatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakatnksh毛n眉sha|godhakatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakatsh毛n眉sha|gokidhakatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakatsh毛rosha|dhakatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakatnksh毛rosha|godhakatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakatsh毛rosha|gokidhakatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakatsh毛musha|dhakatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakatnksh毛musha|godhakatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakatsh毛musha|gokidhakatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakatron眉sha|dhakatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakatnkron眉sha|godhakatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakatron眉sha|gokidhakatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakatrosh毛sha|dhakatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakatnkrosh毛sha|godhakatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakatrosh毛sha|gokidhakatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakatromusha|dhakatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakatnkromusha|godhakatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakatromusha|gokidhakatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakatmun眉sha|dhakatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakatnkmun眉sha|godhakatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakatmun眉sha|gokidhakatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakatmush毛sha|dhakatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakatnkmush毛sha|godhakatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakatmush毛sha|gokidhakatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakatmurosha|dhakatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakatnkmurosha|godhakatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakatmurosha|gokidhakatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhakat|dhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙k忙t|dh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhakat|hodhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙k忙t|hodh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhakat|hohodhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙k忙t|hohodh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhakat|n眉dhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙k忙t|n眉dh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhakat|n眉n眉dhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙k忙t|n眉n眉dh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhakat|n茂dhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙k忙t|n茂dh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhakat|n茂n茂dhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙k忙t|n茂n茂dh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhakat|ludhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙k忙t|ludh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhakat|luludhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙k忙t|luludh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhakat|lidhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙k忙t|lidh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhakat|lilidhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙k忙t|lilidh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhakat|kodhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙k忙t|kodh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhakat|kokodhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙k忙t|kokodh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhakat|kedhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙k忙t|kedh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhakat|kekedhakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙k忙t|kekedh忙k忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
